attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Patient age not stated in the source note; inferred as adult (~36) for the required demographics.age field — clinician to confirm on review.
Patient sex not stated in the source note; inferred female for the required demographics.sex_at_birth field (no clinical bearing on this presentation) — clinician to confirm on review.
Geographic context not stated in the source note; not asserted (living_situation set to 'lives with family, including young children' per the note's social history) — clinician to confirm on review.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-01-00253 — SEQ is provisional; ingest --reseq assigns the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-DERM-01 bucket.

Telehealth reprojection applied: source is an in-person after-hours home visit. The dermatological examination (palpation of the scaly annular borders, distribution mapping, exclusion of deeper nodules/vesicles/pustules), the clinician-measured vitals set, and the KOH microscopy consideration were sealed into 10/11 with telehealth_limits; the video-observable rash appearance and patient-obtainable readings (home thermometer, wearable HR, self-reported weight) were placed in 01.objective_data_offered (verified:false). Presentation layer de-anchored from the clinician's diagnosis.

Tiering: baseline T1 (pharmacist/self-care-manageable), minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1 — a benign, self-limiting superficial dermatophyte infection. The note's in-person 'urgent after-hours MBS 585-600' urgency justification reflects an in-person home-visit billing rationale and was NOT used to inflate the telehealth tier; it maps only to sealed rationale. The serious complications/mimics (secondary infection/cellulitis, tinea capitis/kerion, secondary syphilis) are absent/screened-negative and captured as escalation edges + absent red flags.

Medication doses (terbinafine 1% cream twice daily for 2 weeks to the lesions plus a 2 cm margin) taken verbatim from the source note; no doses synthesised. AMT/PBS codes not assigned for the topical antifungals — omitted rather than guessed pending a terminology receipt.
Candidate SNOMED CT-AU / ICD-10-AM codes are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; SNOMED display terms and differential codes are candidate labels pending the terminology server.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
